trap: All 6 tests written at once (horizontal slicing)
description: Vertical slices: one test → one impl → repeat, not batch

trap: All tests first then all implementation
description: Tracer bullet: one thin slice end-to-end first

trap: Refactoring calculateTotal while tests are failing
description: Never refactor during RED — only when GREEN

trap: Plan to implement all methods at once
description: Write only enough code to pass the current test
